scope_summary: Design P2 remediation for quant-lab after P1 baseline: produce HLD, phase and wave plan, validation matrix, and human-gate decision brief for package identity fallout, documentation drift, and CR tracking historical hygiene without business code remediation, credentials, runtime, production writes, trading, CR-033, or CR102-CR104 closure.
title: quant-lab remediation design for package identity and process tracking hygiene
